Exhibition Room

Poppies

The poppy's brief, brilliant bloom — scarlet against blue irises and yellow daylilies, from the wild fields of Italy and Sardinia to a decorative panel of pure color.

No. 3-1
Poppies and Irises
Nona Dronova · 2024 · Oil on canvas
No. 3-2
Poppies and Columbines, Italy
Nona Dronova · 2019 · Oil on canvas
No. 3-3

Nona Dronova · Oil on canvas
No. 3-4
Poppies, Sardinia
Nona Dronova · 2019 · Oil on canvas
No. 3-5
Red Poppies
Nona Dronova · 2023 · Oil on canvas
No. 3-6
Poppies in the Grass
Nona Dronova · Oil on canvas
No. 3-7
Poppies and Lilies, Decorative Panel
Nona Dronova · Oil on canvas
The Garden as Art

A digital archive of artistic heritage, dedicated to the philosophy of the garden, contemporary art, and the creation of a harmonious living space.
